title: Task outcome: Register all Codex conversations on this computer into DinoBrain Wiki in a safe, useful form wit
summary: Registered Codex conversations from this computer into DinoBrain as a metadata-only Wiki source registry. Scanned 47 Codex JSONL sessions and 4,420 user/assistant message metadata records, wrote local-only metadata archives under 10_Conversations/raw, created 20_Wiki/Codex-Conversation-Registry.md and 60_Operations/session-imports/codex-conversation-registry.json, rebuilt wiki and SQLite indexes, and verified wiki_search finds the registry without storing raw transcripts, message content, or candidates.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Registered Codex conversations from this computer into DinoBrain as a metadata-only Wiki source registry. Scanned 47 Codex JSONL sessions and 4,420 user/assistant message metadata records, wrote local-only metadata archives under 10_Conversations/raw, created 20_Wiki/Codex-Conversation-Registry.md and 60_Operations/session-imports/codex-conversation-registry.json, rebuilt wiki and SQLite indexes, and verified wiki_search finds the registry without storing raw transcripts, message content, or candidates.
request: Register all Codex conversations on this computer into DinoBrain Wiki in a safe, useful form without storing raw full transcripts or secrets.
decisions: Do not store raw full Codex transcripts or message content in Wiki because the data repo is public.
Register sessions first as metadata-only local-only source archives plus a searchable Wiki registry.
Defer content-level extraction and accepted-memory promotion to a separate reviewed pass.
next_steps: Run a separate reviewed extraction/promotion pass if the user wants conversation content summarized into accepted memory.
Do not push raw session archives or unreviewed extracted content to the public data repo.

evidence.snippet: Registered Codex conversations from this computer into DinoBrain as a metadata-only Wiki source registry. Scanned 47 Codex JSONL sessions and 4,420 user/assistant message metadata records, wrote local-only metadata archives under 10_Conversations/raw, created 20_Wiki/Codex-Conversation-Registry.md and 60_Operations/session-imports/codex-conversation-registry.json, rebuilt wiki and SQLite indexes, and verified wiki_search finds the registry without storing raw transcripts, message content, or candidates.

review_notes: Auto-held legacy unreviewed generated memory so it stays out of hot retrieval until lineage is manually confirmed.
